tool_args.label: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
payload.description: 2026 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan listing recurring agenda items and anticipated information items by month for the LIRR Committee

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Approval of Minutes - Recurring Agenda Item

payload.claim_text: The Committee Chair will request a motion to approve the minutes of the prior month's meeting.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments, safety, operations and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications.
payload.description: Recurring agenda item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metric Report - Regular Information Item

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.description: Regular information item for the Long Island Rail Road Committee
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road Committee

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2026
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.
The Agency will present its revised 2026 Financial Plan.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2025 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

tool_args.label: May 2026 - Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
payload.event_name: Final Review of 2025 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2026.
The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2026 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2027 Budget.

This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

tool_args.label: November 2026 - Winter Track Work Programs (West Side Yard)

payload.description: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.

tool_args.label: December 2026 - Approval of 2027 Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2027 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.
